heading: Precision in 3D CV
content: Focusing heavily on 3D Computer Vision, Point Cloud analysis, and Deep Learning (PyTorch). Working on reconstructing 3D environments and human structures.

title: Late 2024
heading: Diving into Computer Vision
content: Began exploring OpenCV and simple machine learning models to analyze human poses and track rhythmic movements in video streams.

title: Early 2024
heading: The Rhythm of House
content: Deepened my passion for House Dance. Realized the connection between physical movement, rhythm, and spatial computing, sparking an interest in computer vision.

heading: Web & Systems
content: Transitioned into full-stack web development. Discovered the power of React and built scalable backend APIs with Node.js and Databases.

heading: The Beginning: Syntax & Logic
content: Started programming journey with Python and C++. Built simple command-line tools and learned the fundamentals of object-oriented programming.
